title: Super Mario Bros. 3
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small agile explorer in a playful platform world with layered terrain, readable obstacles, and bright depth cues, caught in a forward-moving leap through layered terrain.

Game metadata:
- Title: Super Mario Bros. 3
- Platform: Nintendo Entertainment System
- Release year: 1990
- Secondary genre signal: Action

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- restrained retro poster aesthetic, simple shapes, limited palette, readable silhouettes, 8-bit spirit without actual sprites
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- playful, kinetic, bright

Composition:
- one subject slightly left of center, with a clean silhouette and a world behind it that explains the genre immediately
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to mario, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
